day1_opening.name: Me
day1_opening.text: *Cherry blossoms flutter in the breeze. Warm spring air seeps through my school uniform. Starting today, I'm a student here.*

day1_opening_2.name: Me
day1_opening_2.text: *Standing in front of the unfamiliar school gate, my heart is racing. New school, new friends... I hope only good things await.*

day1_hallway_1.name: Me
day1_hallway_1.text: *Walking through the hallway, I have no idea where to go. Where's my classroom...?*

day1_sea_first_2.name: Me
day1_sea_first_2.text: *I turn around to find a girl beaming at me. She's strikingly put-together, with a class representative armband on her sleeve.*

day1_sea_first_3.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_first_3.text: "I'm Han Sea! Class representative. The homeroom teacher told me about you. Nice to meet you, {name}!"

day1_sea_first_4.name: Me
day1_sea_first_4.text: "Oh, hi... But how do you know my name?"

day1_sea_choco.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco.text: "Oh, right! {name}, you like chocolate milk, don't you? Here!"

day1_sea_choco_2.name: Me
day1_sea_choco_2.text: *...Chocolate milk? I never said I liked chocolate milk. I don't even remember drinking it at my old school.*

day1_sea_choco_choice.name: Me
day1_sea_choco_choice.text: *That's weird. Should I just go along with it, or ask?*
choices: "Wait... how did you know I like chocolate milk?"
"Actually, I'm more of a strawberry milk person." (Joke it off)

day1_sea_choco_accept.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco_accept.text: "Hehe, I knew it! It's good, right? I have great intuition~"

day1_sea_choco_question.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco_question.text: "Um... just a hunch? Every transfer student likes chocolate milk, haha!"

day1_sea_choco_question_2.name: Me
day1_sea_choco_question_2.text: *She seems a bit flustered. ...Well, it's probably nothing.*

day1_sea_choco_joke.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_choco_joke.text: "Whaaat?! Strawberry?! ...Oh, I see. I'll, I'll get strawberry next time!"

day1_classroom_enter.name: Me
day1_classroom_enter.text: *Following Sea's lead, I step into the classroom. Strangely, every pair of eyes is fixed on me.*

day1_classroom_enter_2.name: Me
day1_classroom_enter_2.text: *...I get that a transfer student is interesting, but these stares feel less like curiosity and more like... confirmation.*

day1_classroom_enter_3.name: Me
day1_classroom_enter_3.text: *No, I'm overthinking it. It's just the first day jitters.*

day1_eunsu_enter.name: Me
day1_eunsu_enter.text: *The classroom door opens, and the homeroom teacher walks in.*

day1_eunsu_first.name: Park Eunsu
day1_eunsu_first.text: "Alright everyone~ Today I'd like to introduce a new transfer student."

day1_eunsu_first_2.name: Park Eunsu
day1_eunsu_first_2.text: "{name}, would you come up and introduce yourself?"

day1_eunsu_first_3.name: Me
day1_eunsu_first_3.text: *Standing at the blackboard, I feel even more nervous. The teacher is looking at me with particularly... warm eyes. No, warm isn't the right word...*

day1_eunsu_first_6.name: Park Eunsu
day1_eunsu_first_6.text: "Oh, no! I meant the transfer student has finally arrived, haha. Now then, why don't you introduce yourself?"

day1_eunsu_first_7.name: Me
day1_eunsu_first_7.text: *...She just said 'finally.' As if she'd been waiting for me. ...No, it's just a figure of speech.*

day1_seat_guide.name: Park Eunsu
day1_seat_guide.text: "Your seat is over there, by the window in the back row. Go ahead and sit down."

day1_seolhwa_notice.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_notice.text: *I sit down. The seat next to me... no, behind me — someone's there.*

day1_seolhwa_notice_2.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_notice_2.text: *Pale skin, eyes gazing at some distant place. A presence completely detached from the classroom's noise.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_choice.name: Me
choices: "Hi, I'm {name}. Looks like I'm sitting in front of you."

day1_seolhwa_greet_3.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_3.text: *No response. I thought our eyes met for a moment... but she looked away immediately.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_4.name: Boy next to me
day1_seolhwa_greet_4.text: "Hey, transfer kid. What's behind you? What are you looking at?"

day1_seolhwa_greet_5.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_5.text: "Oh, I was just saying hi to the girl sitting behind me..."

day1_seolhwa_greet_8.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_8.text: *I look behind me again. The girl who was definitely sitting there just now... is there. She's still there.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_10.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_10.text: *...He's probably just messing with me. Hazing the new kid. Yeah, that's it.*

day1_seolhwa_skip.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_skip.text: *Let's focus on class. Can't zone out on the first day.*
